# Decision Log Entry

Template for **Layer 9** (`log-decision`). Entries are appended to `docs/decisions/decision-log.md`; see `docs/specs/judgment-memory.md` and `kurosawa-thin-harness-architecture.md` §17.6. The short trade-journal form used in practice is in the `log-decision` skill; this is the full field set for heavier decisions.
